rationale: Four exact official MTA rows establish realized terminal dates and whole-route discontinuation treatments for historical Q20B, Q21, Q34, and QM3 identities. Every successor, replacement, alternative route, rail option, and navigation statement is retained as rider context only and creates no additional route edge. These terminal lifecycle events are intentionally excluded from study projection and must not produce operational occurrences.

study_disposition.reason: historical route service ended in the 2025 Queens Bus Network Redesign and has no current GTFS route anchor
